partners.title: Our Mosquito Nets

features.title: Why Choose Aluminium Space?
features.f1_desc: Robust and durable Grifo Flex mosquito nets.

products.colibri50_desc: Roller mosquito screen for windows with top cassette. Silent spring mechanism. Double brush-seal lateral channels. White aluminum structure RAL 9010.
products.sidney50_desc: Mosquito screen for doors with side cassette. Spring mechanism. Folding external handle. Double brush-seal channels. White aluminum structure.
products.sidney50ac_desc: Double-cassette mosquito screen for large openings and terraces. Bidirectional central opening. Spring mechanism. White aluminum structure.
products.elba_desc: Fixed panel mosquito screen for windows. White aluminum frame. PVC fiberglass mesh. Nylon wall fixings. Simple, economical and effective.
products.plisse31_desc: Bilateral pleated screen (31mm). Ideal for large openings up to 5000mm. Magnetic release, ultra-flat bottom rail and black mesh as standard. Wind resistance Class 1.

products_page.title: Our Products
products_page.why_desc: Our Grifo Flex mosquito nets are made in Italy with high quality materials. Each product is designed to provide optimal protection against insects while remaining aesthetic and discreet. Aluminium Space offers professional custom installation in Mghira and throughout the Tunis region.
products_page.feat1_desc: PVC-coated fiberglass, resistant white aluminum frame.
products_page.feat2_desc: Each mosquito net is adapted to the exact dimensions of your opening.
products_page.feat3_desc: Precision spring mechanisms, double brush-seal slides.
